name: Voltage Drop Calculator
description: Calculates voltage drop in electrical conductors per NEC and IEC standards, with loss drivers and corrective actions.

inputs.label: Conductor Material
inputs.businessContext: Material affects resistivity; copper and aluminum are common in industrial installations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Material affects resistivity; copper and aluminum are common in industrial installations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzeme özdirenci etkiler; bakır ve alüminyum endüstriyel tesislerde yaygındır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Material beeinflusst den spezifischen Widerstand; Kupfer und Aluminium sind in industriellen Installationen üblich.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le matériau affecte la résistivité ; le cuivre et l'aluminium sont courants dans les installations industrielles.
businessContext_i18n.es: El material afecta la resistividad; el cobre y el aluminio son comunes en instalaciones industriales.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تؤثر المادة على المقاومية؛ النحاس والألومنيوم شائعان في التركيبات الصناعية

inputs.label: Conductor Size (AWG or kcmil)
inputs.businessContext: Cross-sectional area determines resistance per unit length.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cross-sectional area determines resistance per unit length.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesit alanı birim uzunluk başına direnci belirler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Querschnittsfläche bestimmt den Widerstand pro Längeneinheit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La section transversale détermine la résistance par unité de longueur.
businessContext_i18n.es: El área de la sección transversal determina la resistencia por unidad de longitud.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تحدد مساحة المقطع العرضي المقاومة لكل وحدة طول

inputs.label: One-Way Circuit Length
inputs.businessContext: Distance from source to load; longer runs increase voltage drop.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance from source to load; longer runs increase voltage drop.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaynaktan yüke olan mesafe; daha uzun hatlar voltaj düşümünü artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Entfernung von der Quelle zur Last; längere Strecken erhöhen den Spannungsabfall.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance de la source à la charge ; les longues distances augmentent la chute de tension.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia desde la fuente hasta la carga; recorridos más largos aumentan la caída de tensión.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المسافة من المصدر إلى الحمل؛ المسافات الطويلة تزيد من انخفاض الجهد.

inputs.label: Load Current (Amperes)
inputs.businessContext: Current drawn by the load; higher current increases drop.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current drawn by the load; higher current increases drop.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yük tarafından çekilen akım; daha yüksek akım düşümü artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Von der Last aufgenommener Strom; höherer Strom erhöht den Abfall.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Courant consommé par la charge ; un courant plus élevé augmente la chute.
businessContext_i18n.es: Corriente consumida por la carga; mayor corriente aumenta la caída.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التيار المسحوب بواسطة الحمل؛ التيار الأعلى يزيد من الانخفاض.

inputs.label: System Voltage (Line-to-Line)
inputs.businessContext: Nominal voltage of the system; used to compute percentage drop.

businessContext_i18n.en: Nominal voltage of the system; used to compute percentage drop.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sistemin nominal voltajı; yüzde düşümü hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Nennspannung des Systems; wird zur Berechnung des prozentualen Abfalls verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tension nominale du système ; utilisée pour calculer le pourcentage de chute.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tensión nominal del sistema; se utiliza para calcular el porcentaje de caída.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الجهد الاسمي للنظام؛ يُستخدم لحساب النسبة المئوية للانخفاض.

inputs.label: Phase Type
inputs.businessContext: Single-phase or three-phase affects the voltage drop formula (factor sqrt(3) for three-phase).

businessContext_i18n.en: Single-phase or three-phase affects the voltage drop formula (factor sqrt(3) for three-phase).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek fazlı veya üç fazlı, voltaj düşümü formülünü etkiler (üç fazlı için sqrt(3) faktörü).
businessContext_i18n.de: Einphasig oder Dreiphasig beeinflusst die Spannungsabfallformel (Faktor sqrt(3) für Dreiphasen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Monophasé ou triphasé affecte la formule de chute de tension (facteur sqrt(3) pour triphasé).
businessContext_i18n.es: La fase única o trifásica afecta la fórmula de caída de tensión (factor √3 para trifásica).
businessContext_i18n.ar: نظام أحادي الطور أو ثلاثي الطور يؤثر على معادلة انخفاض الجهد (عامل الجذر التربيعي لـ 3 للطور الثلاثي).

inputs.label: Power Factor (cos φ)
inputs.businessContext: Reactive component increases effective current; typical industrial PF is 0.8-0.95.

businessContext_i18n.en: Reactive component increases effective current; typical industrial PF is 0.8-0.95.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Reaktif bileşen efektif akımı artırır; tipik endüstriyel güç faktörü 0.8-0.95'tir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Blindanteil erhöht den effektiven Strom; typischer industrieller Leistungsfaktor ist 0,8-0,95.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La composante réactive augmente le courant effectif ; le facteur de puissance industriel typique est de 0,8 à 0,95.
businessContext_i18n.es: El componente reactivo aumenta la corriente efectiva; el FP industrial típico es 0.8-0.95.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المكون التفاعلي يزيد من التيار الفعال؛ معامل القدرة النموذجي الصناعي هو 0.8-0.95.

inputs.label: Ambient Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature affects conductor resistance; higher temperature increases resistance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature affects conductor resistance; higher temperature increases resistance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıcaklık iletken direncini etkiler; yüksek sıcaklık direnci artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Temperatur beeinflusst den Leiterwiderstand; höhere Temperatur erhöht den Widerstand.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La température affecte la résistance du conducteur ; une température plus élevée augmente la résistance.
businessContext_i18n.es: La temperatura afecta la resistencia del conductor; una temperatura más alta aumenta la resistencia.
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة الحرارة تؤثر على مقاومة الموصل؛ درجة الحرارة الأعلى تزيد المقاومة.

rules.message: Long circuit with high current may require parallel conductors or larger size.
Voltage drop exceeds 3% recommended by NEC for branch circuits.
Voltage drop exceeds 5% recommended by NEC for feeders.
Low power factor increases voltage drop; consider power factor correction.
High ambient temperature reduces conductor ampacity; check NEC derating.

thresholds.message: Voltage drop exceeds 5% – immediate redesign recommended.
Voltage drop between 3% and 5% – consider larger conductor or shorter run.
Load current exceeds conductor ampacity – risk of overheating.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
